skill.description: Shapeshift into a Wyvern and launch yourself backwards with a powerful wingbeat that Knocks Back enemies. Enemies Primed for Heavy Stun will be stunned, release a shockwave, and have a chance to grant you a Power Charge. This skill can be used while using other skills to interrupt them.

skill.name: Wither
skill.description: Channel a debilitating hex that Withers enemies in the area.

skill.name: Withering Presence
skill.description: While active, emits an Aura that periodically Withers enemies in your Presence.

skill.name: Wolf Pack
skill.description: Activate to summon a pack of Wolf Companions. The pack treated as a single Companion for effects that count or limit Companions, regardless of the number of Wolves in the pack.

support.name: Abiding Hex
support.description: Supports Curse Skills you cast yourself. Supported Skills will consume Power Charges on use, gaining significant Curse duration if they do.

support.name: Accelerated Growth
support.description: Supports Plant Skills, causing them to Trigger an explosion after they have been Overgrown.

support.name: Accelerated Growth II
support.description: Supports Plant Skills, causing them to Trigger an explosion after they have been Overgrown, Blinding enemies Hit.

support.name: Acrimony
support.description: Supports Skills which can Damage Enemies. Enemies affected by Damage over time from Supported Skills which was not caused by a Damaging Ailment have reduced Life regeneration rate. Only the strongest instance of this Debuff will apply. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

support.name: Adhesive Grenades I
support.description: Supports Grenade Skills. Grenades from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land, but doing lower damage when they detonate.

support.name: Adhesive Grenades II
support.description: Supports Grenade Skills. Grenades from Supported Skills do not bounce, instead halting movement where they intially land.

support.name: Admixture
support.description: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Bleeding inflicted by those Hits is more effective against Poisoned Enemies, and Poison inflicted by Supported Skills is more effective against Bleeding Enemies.

support.name: Advancing Storm
support.description: Supports Spells which create Storms, causing them to originate from the player and move towards the target location. Cannot Support Triggered Skills.

support.name: Aftershock I
support.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, giving them a chance to create an Aftershock.

support.name: Aftershock II
support.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, giving them a chance to create an Aftershock.

support.name: Ahn's Citadel
support.description: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to instead be created along a fissure.

support.name: Ailith's Chimes
support.description: Supports Skills which can expend Combo. On expending Combo with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain Power Charges based on the amount of Combo expended.

support.name: Alignment I
support.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction deal much more Damage. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.

support.name: Alignment II
support.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction deal much more Damage. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.

support.name: Alignment III
support.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Supported Skills indicate one of four directions, changing indicated direction when an Attack with Supported Skill matches that direction. Attacks from Supported Skills which match the indicated direction fire additional Projectiles. Cannot Support Channelled Skills.

support.name: Amanamu's Tithe
support.description: Supports Persistent Minion Skills, granting a chance when Supported Minions die for you to gain an Abyssal Monster Modifier.

support.name: Ambrosia
support.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Mana Flask charges, Gaining a percentage of damage as extra Lightning damage per Mana Flask charge consumed.

support.name: Ambrosia II
support.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Mana Flask charges, Gaining a percentage of damage as extra Lightning damage per Mana Flask charge consumed.

support.name: Ambush
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more likely to Critically Hit enemies on full life.

support.name: Ammo Conservation I
support.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing.

support.name: Ammo Conservation II
support.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing.

support.name: Ammo Conservation III
support.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, granting a chance to not consume a Bolt when firing, at the cost of Reload speed.

support.name: Ancestral Call I
support.description: Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

support.name: Ancestral Call II
support.description: Supports Strikes you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds. Cannot Support Channelled Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

support.name: Arakaali's Lust
support.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing it to deal increasingly higher damage the more Poisons are on the target.

support.name: Arbiter's Ignition
support.description: Supports Fire Spell Skills causing you to gain Elemental Archon when Igniting with them.

support.name: Arcane Surge
support.description: Supports Spells you cast yourself, tracking the mana you spend to cast them. Spending enough mana grants a burst of Mana Regeneration and Cast Speed.

support.name: Arjun's Medal
support.description: Supports Crossbow Skills, causing them to load a bolt into all Crossbow Ammunition on kill.

support.name: Armour Break I
support.description: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Break Armour based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt.

support.name: Armour Break II
support.description: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Break Armour based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt. On Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain an Endurance Charge.

support.name: Armour Break III
support.description: Supports Skills that Hit Enemies, causing those Hits to Break Armour based on a portion of Physical Damage dealt. On Fully Breaking Armour with Supported Skills, you have a chance to gain an Endurance Charge.

support.name: Armour Demolisher I
support.description: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger.

support.name: Armour Demolisher II
support.description: Supports any skill, causing Armour Break it inflicts to be stronger.

support.name: Armour Explosion
support.description: Supports Attacks and Warcries, causing them to trigger a Fiery explosion when they Fully Break an enemy's Armour.

support.name: Astral Projection
support.description: Supports Nova Skills, causing those Skills to take place at the targeted location when used instead of around you.

support.name: Atalui's Bloodletting
support.description: Supports any Skill, turning a portion of its Mana cost into a Life cost. Does not support Skills which reserve Spirit. Supported Skills Gain a portion of their Life cost as extra Physical Damage.

support.name: Atziri's Allure
support.description: Supports Curse Spells you cast yourself, causing those Curses to ignore the usual Curse Limit, but be reflected back to you when inflicted.

support.name: Atziri's Call
support.description: [DNT] Supports Spells you use yourself which Hit enemies. On Critical Hit with supported Spells, Trigger Atziri's Storm at the location of the nearest enemy.

support.name: Atziri's Communion
support.description: [DNT] Supports Buff skills which reserve Spirit. Spirit costs from Supported Skills are converted to reserve a percentage of your Life.

support.name: Atziri's Impatience
support.description: Supports Skills with Cooldowns, dramatically increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover, but causing you to lose Life, Mana, and Energy Shield when they are used. Cannot Support Meta Skills or modify the Skills of Minions.

support.name: Auto Reload
support.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to automatically reload when they Heavy Stun an enemy.

support.name: Barbs I
support.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills. Supported Skills deal your Thorns Damage on Hit after you've Retaliated with Thorns Damage.

support.name: Barbs II
support.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills. Supported Skills deal your Thorns Damage on Hit after you've Retaliated with Thorns Damage.

support.name: Barbs III
support.description: Supports Melee Strike Skills. Supported Skills deal your Thorns Damage on Hit twice after you've Retaliated with Thorns Damage.

support.name: Battershout
support.description: Supports Warcry Skills. Supported Skills Consume Fully Broken Armour to trigger Physical Damage explosions on Enemies within their range but cannot themselves Break Armour.

support.name: Behead I
support.description: Supports Strike skills, causing them to steal a Modifier from Rare monsters they kill.

support.name: Behead II
support.description: Supports Strike skills, causing them to steal two Modifiers from Rare monsters they kill.

support.name: Bhatair's Vengeance
support.description: Supports Attacks and Warcries you use yourself. Freezing an enemy with Supported Skills infuses you and your allies with Cold damage for a short time.

support.name: Bidding I
support.description: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions deal more damage and have increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.

support.name: Bidding II
support.description: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions deal more damage and have increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.

support.name: Bidding III
support.description: Supports Minion Skills. Supported Minions have significantly increased Cooldown Recovery Rate with Command Skills.

support.name: Biting Frost I
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage to Frozen enemies but consume their Freeze. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.

support.name: Biting Frost II
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to deal more damage to Frozen enemies but consume their Freeze, leaving them Chilled. Cannot support skills that Consume Freeze.

support.name: Blazing Critical
support.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Hit enemies. Critical Hits with Supported Skills imbue all of your Attacks with Fire damage for a duration.

support.name: Bleed I
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to inflict Bleeding.

support.name: Bleed II
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to inflict Bleeding.

support.name: Bleed III
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to inflict Bleeding.

support.name: Bleed IV
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more Melee Physical Damage to Bleeding Enemies, but be unable to inflict Bleeding itself. Supported Skills also inflict Incision on Hit.

support.name: Blind I
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to Blind on Hit.

support.name: Blind II
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing them to Blind on Hit with increased effect.

support.name: Blindside
support.description: Supports Skills which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills are more likely to Critically Hit Blinded Enemies, and deal more Damage with Critical Hits against Blinded Enemies, but cannot themselves inflict Blind.

support.name: Bloodlust
support.description: Supports Melee Attacks, causing them to deal more damage against Bleeding enemies, but preventing them from inflicting Bleeding.

support.name: Bone Shrapnel
support.description: Supported Skills cannot cause Pin buildup

support.name: Boundless Energy I
support.description: Supports Meta Skills. Supported Skills generate Energy significantly faster.

support.name: Boundless Energy II
support.description: Supports Meta Skills. Supported Skills generate Energy significantly faster.

support.name: Bounty I
support.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Flask and Charm charges.

support.name: Bounty II
support.description: Supports any Skill that Hits Enemies, causing Enemies it kills to grant more Flask and Charm charges.

support.name: Brambleslam
support.description: Supports Slam Skills. Supported Skills create Hazardous Brambles on the ground that activate after a duration. Enemies which come in contact with these thorns take damage and are Maimed. A maximum of 20 Brambles are allowed at one time. Does not modify Skills used by Minions or Totems.

support.name: Branching Fissures I
support.description: Supports Skills which create Fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional secondary Fissures which branch off from the primary fissure, with lowered area of effect and Damage.

support.name: Branching Fissures II
support.description: Supports Skills which create Fissures in the ground, causing them to create additional secondary Fissures which branch off from the primary fissure, with lowered area of effect and Damage.

support.name: Brink I
support.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills build up Heavy Stun more quickly, but cannot themselves Heavy Stun.

support.name: Brink II
support.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills build up Stun more quickly, but cannot themselves Stun.

support.name: Brittle Armour
support.description: Supports Skills which can Hit enemies. Hits with Supported Skills which Freeze enemies cause Physical damage against them to Break their Armour while they remain Frozen.

support.name: Brutality I
support.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its Physical damage at the expense of all other Damage Types.

support.name: Brutality II
support.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its Physical damage at the expense of all other Damage Types.

support.name: Brutality III
support.description: Supports any skill that deals damage, boosting its Physical damage at the expense of all other Damage Types, as well as giving Hits from that skill a chance to ignore Physical Damage reduction.

support.name: Brutus' Brain
support.description: Supports skills which create Minions, causing those Minions to be unable to deal or take Damage. Cannot support skills which create undamageable Minions.

support.name: Burgeon I
support.description: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, causing them to deal more damage the longer they have been Channelled.

support.name: Burgeon II
support.description: Supports Channelling Skills you use yourself, causing them to deal more damage the longer they have been Channelled.

support.name: Burning Inscription
support.description: Supported Skills trigger Burning Inscription after their Runic Inscriptions expire

support.name: Bursting Plague
support.description: Supports skills that can Poison enemies, causing Poisoned enemies to gain Plague over time and explode in a Plague Burst on death. Cannot support the skills of Minions.

support.name: Cadence
support.description: Supports Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills gain more Attack speed each time you use them, but will become unusable if used too frequently in a short time frame. Sustained Skills will instead gain Attack speed periodically while being used.

support.name: Caltrops
support.description: Supports Ranged Spear Attacks. Supported Skills create Caltrops when Projectiles they create reach the end of their flight.

support.name: Cannibalism I
support.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to recover Life on kill while the Skill is active.

support.name: Cannibalism II
support.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to recover Life on kill while the Skill is active.

support.name: Catalysing Elements

support.name: Catharsis

Supported Skill can only be used while you have a certain amount of Volatility and cannot support Skills which already have another Condition. Does not support Triggered Skills.

support.name: Chain I

support.name: Chain II
support.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.

support.name: Chain III
support.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain additional times.

support.name: Chaos Attunement
support.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Gain Chaos Damage but deal less Damage of other Types.

support.name: Chaos Mastery
support.description: Supports Chaos skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

support.name: Chaotic Freeze
support.description: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment Chaos damage over time. Enemies taking damage over time from Debuffs caused by supported skills will suffer Freeze build up from Chaos damage Hits from any source. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

support.name: Charge Profusion I
support.description: Supports skills that can generate Charges, giving them a chance to generate an additional Charge when they do so.

support.name: Charge Profusion II
support.description: Supports skills that can generate Charges, giving them a chance to generate an additional Charge when they do so, as well as a chance to generate an additional Charge of a random type.

support.name: Charged Mark
support.description: Supports Mark Skills, causing them to Trigger Charged Mark when they are Activated. Charged Mark creates Shocked Ground at the target's location.

support.name: Charged Shots I

support.name: Charged Shots II
support.description: Supports Bow Attacks. Every third shot with Supported Skills Gains Damage as extra Lightning Damage.

support.name: Cirel's Cultivation
support.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, preventing you from having more than one of that Totem but granting significant benefits for Supported Totems based how many allied Totems are near them. Does not Support Skills used by Minions.

support.name: Clarity I
support.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Mana Regeneration while the Skill is active.

support.name: Clarity II
support.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to gain increased Mana Regeneration while the Skill is active.

support.name: Clash

support.name: Close Combat I
support.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.

support.name: Close Combat II
support.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to deal more damage to enemies based on how close they are to you.

support.name: Cold Attunement
support.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Gain Cold Damage but deal less Fire and Lightning Damage.

support.name: Cold Exposure

support.name: Cold Mastery
support.description: Supports Cold skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

support.name: Cold Penetration
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Cold resistance.

support.name: Combo Finisher I
support.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until enough Combo has been built up, but deal more damage. Cannot support skills which already Combo, or Triggered Skills.

support.name: Combo Finisher II
support.description: Supports Melee Attacks you use yourself. Supported Skills cannot be used until enough Combo has been built up, but deal massively more damage. Cannot support skills which already Combo, or Triggered Skills.

support.name: Commandment

support.name: Commiserate
support.description: Supports Skills you use yourself or Trigger, which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills inflict more powerful Ailments if you are afflicted with those Ailments when you inflict them, while also removing from you any Ailment that they inflict.

support.name: Compressed Duration I
support.description: Supports any skill that has a duration making that duration shorter.

support.name: Compressed Duration II
support.description: Supports any skill that has a duration making that duration shorter.

support.name: Concentrated Area
support.description: Supports any skill with an area of effect, causing that area to be smaller but any area damage it deals to be higher.

support.name: Concoct I
support.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Life Flask charges, inflicting more powerful Bleeding based on Life Flask charges consumed.

support.name: Concoct II
support.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which Damage enemies with Hits. Supported Skills consume a percentage of your maximum Life Flask charges, inflicting more powerful Bleeding based on Life Flask charges consumed.

support.name: Concussive Spells
support.description: Supports Spells which Hit enemies. Supported Skills Daze on Critically Hitting enemies with Physical damage.

support.name: Considered Casting
support.description: Supports Spell Skills that Hit Enemies and you cast yourself, boosting Damage at the cost of Cast Speed.

support.name: Controlled Destruction
support.description: Supports Spells that Hit enemies, boosting their damage but preventing them from dealing Critical Hits.

support.name: Controlled Hazard
support.description: Supports Skills which create Hazards, causing those Hazards to be unable to be triggered for 3 seconds after being created.

support.name: Cool Headed
support.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing Ignite applied to you to last for a shorter duration while the Supported Skill is active.

support.name: Cooldown Recovery I
support.description: Supports skills with Cooldowns, increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

support.name: Cooldown Recovery II
support.description: Supports skills with Cooldowns, increasing the rate at which those Cooldowns Recover. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

support.name: Corpse Conservation
support.description: Supports skills that consume Corpses, giving them a chance to take effect without destroying the Corpse.

support.name: Corrosion
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing Poison it applies to also Break enemy Armour. Cannot support skills that Consume Fully Broken Armour.

support.name: Corrupting Cry I
support.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to inflict Corrupted Blood on enemies in their area of effect.

support.name: Corrupting Cry II
support.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to inflict Corrupted Blood on enemies in their area of effect.

support.name: Coursing Current
support.description: Supports Skills which Hit enemies. Shocking an enemy with Supported Skills Triggers Coursing Current, which sends Chaining Lightning Projectiles to nearby Drenched enemies.

support.name: Crackling Barrier
support.description: Supports Channelling Skills. While Channelling Supported Skills, you gain Lightning Thorns based off of your maximum Mana.

support.name: Crater
support.description: Supports Melee Skills that leap into the air, causing them to create Fissures when you land. Cannot Support Totem Skills, and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

support.name: Crazed Minions
support.description: Supports Minion Skills which summon Reviving Minions. Supported Minions deal significantly more Damage if they have Revived Recently.

support.name: Creeping Chill
support.description: Supports any Skill that creates Ice Crystals, causing that Skill to Consume a Power Charge if possible to create Chilled Ground around the Crystal.

support.name: Crescendo I

support.name: Crescendo II
support.description: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, allowing you to use the Final Strike twice in succession, and causing Non-Final Strike Attacks to be faster.

support.name: Crescendo III
support.description: Supports Strikes that perform a Final Strike at the end of a combination of attacks, causing the Final Strike to be Ancestrally Boosted.

support.name: Crystalline Shards
support.description: Supports Skills which create Ice Crystals. Damaging Explosions caused by Ice Crystals from Supported Skills will Impale Enemies.

support.name: Culling Strike I

support.name: Culling Strike II
support.description: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to Cull Rare and Unique Enemies on Hit, and increasing the threshold at which they will Cull Enemies.

support.name: Culmination I
support.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills reset their Combo on use, dealing more Damage the higher Combo you had on use. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

support.name: Culmination II
support.description: Supports Melee Attack Skills. Supported Skills gain Combo when you successfully Strike Enemies with other Melee Attacks. Supported Skills reset their Combo on use, dealing more Damage the higher Combo you had on use. Cannot support skills which already gain Combo. Does not modify Skills used by Minions.

support.name: Cursed Ground
support.description: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create areas which Curse Enemies so long as they are within them.

support.name: Danse Macabre
support.description: Supports Offering Skills. Supported Skills have increased Buff effect and deal more damage, but will target an additional skeletal Minion when cast. If there is not an additional skeletal Minion to target, no damage or Buff effect will be granted.

support.name: Daresso's Passion
support.description: Supports Banner Skills, causing them to require significantly less Glory to use.

support.name: Dauntless
support.description: Supports Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills cannot be used unless you have been stationary for a certain duration, but deal increasingly more damage the longer you are stationary. Cannot support Skills which have a reservation, are Triggered, have a cooldown or have another usage Condition.

support.name: Deadly Herald

support.name: Deadly Poison I

support.name: Deadly Poison II
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Poison.

support.name: Decaying Hex

support.name: Deep Cuts I
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Bleeding.

support.name: Deep Cuts II
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal less damage but inflict more potent Bleeding.

support.name: Deep Freeze
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing Freeze it inflicts to last longer.

support.name: Defy II

support.name: Deliberation

support.name: Derange

support.name: Dialla's Desire
support.description: Supports any Skill which has levels, increasing the level and Quality, while reducing the cost and Reservation.

support.name: Direstrike I
support.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.

support.name: Direstrike II
support.description: Supports Persistent Buff Skills, causing you to deal increased Attack Damage while on Low Life while the Supported Skill is active.

support.name: Doedre's Undoing
support.description: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create Hazardous areas which explode when Enemies enter them, Cursing Enemies and dealing Chaos Damage.

support.name: Dominus' Grasp
support.description: Supports Projectile skills and any other skills that Chain, causing them to Chain more times.

support.name: Double Barrel I

support.name: Double Barrel II
support.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed.

support.name: Double Barrel III
support.description: Supports Crossbow Ammunition Skills, causing them to load an extra bolt at the cost of reload speed. Supported Skills will also automatically reload when they Heavy Stun an enemy.

support.name: Drain Ailments
support.description: Supports Spells that deal non-Ailment damage over time, causing them to consume Ailments on enemies it applies damage over time Debuffs to in order to deal substantially more damage over time.

support.name: Dreamer's Knell
support.description: [DNT-UNUSED] Supported Skills create a Bell for every 2 Combo expended when expending Combo

support.name: Efficiency I
support.description: Supports any skill, making it cost less to use. Cannot support skills which reserve Spirit.

support.name: Efficiency II
support.description: Supports any skill, making it cost less to use. Cannot support skills which reserve Spirit.

support.name: Elemental Armament I

support.name: Elemental Armament II

support.name: Elemental Armament III

support.name: Elemental Army

support.name: Empowered Sparks I

support.name: Empowered Sparks II
support.description: Supports Skills which generate Charges. When generating Power Charge with Supported Skills, Empower some of your Attacks to Trigger Spark Projectiles on use.

support.name: Encroaching Ground
support.description: Supports Skills that create Ground Surfaces, causing those Surfaces to grow over time, up to a limit.

support.name: Enduring Impact I
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to gain an Endurance Charge when causing a Heavy Stun.

support.name: Enduring Impact II
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, giving it a chance to gain an Endurance Charge when causing a Heavy Stun.

support.name: Energy Capacitor
support.description: Supports Invocation Skills which Trigger other Skills. Supported Skills have significantly higher Maximum Energy.

support.name: Energy Retention

support.name: Enraged Warcry I

support.name: Enraged Warcry II
support.description: Supports Warcries, causing them to spend Rage to bypass their usual Cooldown.

support.name: Eonyr's Thunder
support.description: [DNT] Supports any Skill which can deal Damage. Lightning Damage from Supported Skills can inflict Electrocute, but Supported Skills cannot inflict Shock. support.name: Escalating Poison

support.name: Eternal Flame II
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing its Ignites to last longer.

support.name: Eternal Flame III

support.name: Eternal Mark
support.description: Supports Mark Skills, causing them to not be Consumed the first time they are Activated.

support.name: Excise

support.name: Execrate
support.description: Supports any damaging Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher chance to inflict Ailments on hit, but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

support.name: Execute I
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life.

support.name: Execute II
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life.

support.name: Execute III
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to deal more damage against enemies on Low Life, as well as dealing more damage while you are on Low Life.

support.name: Expand
support.description: Supports Spells you cast yourself, increasing their area of effect when cast. Cannot support Channelling Skills or Skills with a Cooldown.

support.name: Expanse
support.description: Supports any Skill that you use yourself, granting it significantly higher Area of Effect but causing it to gain a long cooldown. Cannot support Skills which already have a cooldown.

support.name: Feeding Frenzy II
support.description: Minions from Supported Skills deal 30% more Damage

support.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to Gain Fire Damage but deal less Cold and Lightning Damage.

support.description: Supports Fire skills, granting them an additional level. Does not support skills which do not have levels.

support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making those Hits Penetrate enemy Fire resistance.

support.name: Fire Penetration II

support.name: Fist of War I

support.name: Fist of War II
support.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a powerful Ancestral Boost every few seconds.

support.name: Fist of War III
support.description: Supports Slams you use yourself, providing a very powerful Ancestral Boost infrequently.

support.name: Flamepierce

support.name: Fluke

support.name: Focused Curse
support.description: Supports Curse skills, causing them to Curse enemies more quickly after being cast.

support.name: Font of Blood

support.name: Font of Mana
support.description: Supports Skills which create Totems. Totems created by supported Skills generate a Font of Mana which will Leech Mana to Allies within it.

support.name: Fortress I

support.name: Fortress II
support.description: Supports skills that create walls in a line, causing them to be created in a circle instead but deal less Hit damage and have lowered Area of Effect.

support.name: Freeze
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, making it more effective at Freezing enemies.

support.name: Freezefork

support.description: Supports Attacks you use yourself or that you Trigger, causing them to Consume the Parried Debuff on Hit to grant you a Frenzy Charge. Cannot support Skills which already Consume the Parried Debuff.

support.name: Fresh Clip I

support.name: Fresh Clip II
support.description: Supports Crossbow Skills, granting them more damage for each bolt reloaded by that Skill in the last 8 seconds.

support.name: Frost Nexus
support.description: Supports any skill that Hits enemies, causing it to create patches of Chilled Ground around Frozen enemies.

support.name: Frostfire

support.name: Frozen Spite
support.description: Supports Attack Skills, causing them to create Ice Fragments on killing Frozen Enemies. Cannot Support Totem Skills and does not modify Skills used by Minions.

support.name: Gambleshot

support.name: Garukhan's Resolve
support.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which do not already have some Condition for use. Cannot support Skills which have a Cooldown or that are Triggered, and does not modify skills used by Minions.

support.description: Supports any Skill which creates Ice Crystals, causing them to be created with higher Life.

support.name: Gorge

support.name: Guatelitzi's Ablation

While Offering spikes from Supported Skills persist, you are periodically granted a Power Charge. When spikes from Supported Skills die, Regenerate a percentage of your maximum Life and Mana per second based on the duration the Offering persisted.

support.name: Haemocrystals
support.description: Supports Attack Skills you use yourself which can cause Damaging Hits. Supported Skills Consume Bleeding on Hit to create explosive blood-filled crystals, but cannot themselves inflict Bleeding. Cannot Support Skills which already Consume Bleeding.

support.name: Hardy Totems I

support.name: Hardy Totems II
support.description: Supports Skills which create Totems, causing those Totems to have more Life.

support.name: Harmonic Remnants II
support.description: Supports Skills which create Remnants, allowing those Remnants to be collected from further away, with a chance to create an additional Remnant.

support.name: Hayoxi's Fulmination
support.description: Supports Curse Skills. Supported Curse Skills create areas which Curse enemies so long as they are within them. Cursed areas from Supported Skills gather power before erupting in a column of annihilating light after a moderate delay.

support.name: Heavy Swing
support.description: Supports Melee Attacks, boosting their Physical damage at the cost of Attack Speed.

support.name: Heft
support.description: Supports Skills which deal Damage, increasing the maximum Physical Damage of their Hits.

support.name: Heightened Accuracy I
support.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy.

support.name: Heightened Accuracy II
support.description: Supports Attacks, causing them to gain Accuracy, and never miss against Enemies on full Life.

support.name: Heightened Charges
support.description: Supports any Skill that Consumes Charges, granting a chance for benefits of that Consumption to be doubled.

support.name: Heightened Curse
support.description: Supports Curse Skills, magnifying their power.

support.name: Helbrym's Hide

support.name: Herbalism I
